description: Letter, possibly a draft, from a certain Avraham to an addressee whose name is not preserved. The content is not clear, but the Pasha and the Sultan are mentioned as well as a certain Shelomo. Refers to having written a petition (ʿarḍ) to the king and not being able to act until his order arrives. On recto and verso jottings. (Information in part from A. David via FGP.)
